pages.raw_text:
The placer grounds of the st. Joe
and st. Maries rivers. just over the
state line in Idaho, are attracting the
attention of mining men generally of
late, and several deals are now pend
ing. Chief among these is the prop
erty owned by the Tyson Brothers,
which is considered the most valu-
able in the district.


The placers of the Idaho panhandle
are of comparative recent discovery.
although in the early '70s the rush
from California to the then new dig
gings in the Cariboo district of Brit
ish Columbia left many stragglers
through Idaho, who located some
wonderfully rich ground.


The St. Joe and st. Maries country
appears to have been overlooked for
many years, and It's discovery at this
late date has called for general re-
vivai in interest in the placer mines
Of that state.
